items.title: List Patients
items.description: Retrieve a list of patients with optional filtering and pagination

items.title: Create Appointment
items.description: Create a new appointment with patient information and scheduling details

items.title: Get Patient
items.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific patient including medical history

items.title: Update Appointment
items.description: Update an existing appointment's information and status

items.title: Create Invoice
items.description: Create a new invoice for patient treatment or services

items.title: Get Practice Analytics
items.description: Retrieve practice performance metrics and insights
